perspectives.LOCAL: Node metrics — CPU, memory, latency, uptime
perspectives.CENTRAL: Hub aggregation — rolling 5min averages across all nodes
perspectives.EXTERNAL: Oracle — external latency proxy, internet reachability

incidents.description: Progressive latency increase 4ms → 180ms over 2h. LOCAL and CENTRAL still functional. Oracle degrades first.
Vital service stops at t=10h (uptime=0, CPU=0). Immediate collapse.
LOCAL node stops emitting entirely. CENTRAL and EXTERNAL remain GREEN.
incidents.expected_diagnosis: Local hardware or network isolation. Not an ISP issue.

incidents.description: Oracle (EXTERNAL) stops emitting. LOCAL and CENTRAL nominal.
incidents.expected_diagnosis: External monitoring provider issue. Internal systems unaffected.
